steps: Alice signed in and reviewed separate incoming and outgoing dashboards
Alice created a request for Bob and verified the shareable link
Alice demonstrated outgoing search and status filtering
Alice opened the detail view and reviewed amount, note, participants, and expiration data
Bob paid the incoming request after the simulated processing delay
Bob declined a second incoming request from the dashboard
Alice cancelled a pending outgoing request from the detail view
Alice opened an expired request detail and confirmed actions were blocked
